description_long: This nightstand features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular body and four slightly splayed legs. The main body is finished in a matte black color, while the front face of the drawer showcases a natural wood grain pattern, adding a touch of warmth and contrast. The drawer appears to be handleless, maintaining a sleek and uninterrupted surface. The legs are slender and angled outward, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The top surface is flat and spacious enough to support small items such as lamps, books, or decor. There are no visible decorative elements or hardware, emphasizing its clean and functional style.
description: A modern nightstand with a matte black body, wood grain drawer front, and splayed black legs. Its minimalist design features a handleless drawer and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, black finish, and a hint of the wood grain drawer front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wood grain drawer front and the splayed black legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and showing the other edge of the wood grain drawer.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid matte black back and the four splayed legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
